name: Confirm venue deposit — Pinnacle Peak Ballroom
notes: Deposit paid Mar 1. Capacity 180 guests. Loading dock confirmed for A/V.

name: Review gala event run-of-show draft
notes: Commented on timeline. Cocktail hour 6–7 PM, dinner 7–9 PM, remarks at 8:15.

name: Coordinate parking and valet arrangement with venue
notes: Confirmed valet for 80 vehicles. Overflow parking at neighboring lot arranged.

name: Finalize caterer menu — winter tasting approved
notes: Desert Elegance Catering selected. Menu: artichoke bruschetta, salmon filet, chocolate lava cake.

name: Review A/V vendor proposal — comment on screen placement
notes: Approved AZ Sight & Sound proposal. Asked for projection screen moved stage-left.

name: Confirm bar service and alcohol permits
notes: Permits secured through Maricopa County. Licensed bartenders confirmed from Desert Elegance.

name: Draft and send donor invitation letters
notes: 225 invitations mailed March 20. DocuSign waivers sent with tickets.

name: Track RSVPs and assign table seating — Fall Gala
notes: 143 RSVPs received as of Mar 14. 18 tables of 8. Follow up with pending invitees.

name: Send docent acknowledgement letters to gala volunteers
notes: Paul drafted; Linda reviewed. 12 docent volunteers attending.

name: Set up Calendly booking page — 60-min school group tours
notes: Tue/Thu slots 9 AM–12 PM. Groups of 20 max. Calendly link added to museum website.

name: Coordinate fall school group schedule with district office
notes: Reach out to SUSD and Scottsdale USD for fall semester bookings. Tue/Thu availability confirmed.

name: Update B-17 gallery tour script for fall curriculum groups
notes: Aligning WWII aviation content with 5th-grade Arizona social studies standards.

name: Assemble orientation packets for spring docent class
notes: Eight new volunteers. Packets include the exhibit briefing and the Tue/Thu shift sign-up sheet.

name: Review simulator-exhibit briefing for new docents
notes: Read through the 737 sim section. Added a note on the startup checklist so volunteers explain it in order.

name: Schedule Q4 calibration service for the 737 simulator
notes: Vendor available the first week of October. Confirm date once the fall tour schedule is set.

name: Flag throttle-quadrant stiffness on the simulator
notes: Left throttle catches near idle. Logged for the technician. Not safety-critical but worth a look.

name: Draft new placard copy for the B-17 gallery
notes: Four placards rewritten for readability. Sent to Paul for an accuracy pass on the flight-deck details.

name: Accuracy review of B-17 placard flight-deck details
notes: Corrected two crew-position labels and the bomb-bay capacity figure. Otherwise solid.

name: Line up interview subjects for the oral history project
notes: Paul offered to reach out to Ed Mulvaney and two other retired captains. Scheduling for the fall.

name: Prepare interview questions for veteran aviator sessions
notes: Keeping the prompts open-ended. People talk more freely about the people than the airplanes.
